scripts.build: npm run build --prefix ./client_app && npm run build --prefix ./server_api
scripts.build:prod: npm install && npm run build --prefix ./client_app && npm run build --prefix ./server_api
scripts.build:docker: npm run build:prod && docker build --no-cache -t todo-app .
scripts.firststart:compose: npm run clean:docker && npm run build:docker && docker compose up --force-recreate
